title: Simply Medieval Modpack
description: A thrown-together modpack of neat mods that adds Simply Medieval Vanilla+ experiences. Weapons, Armor, Hydration, and Waystones.
body:
## The Simply Medieval Modpack

**Modpack Design**

The design of the modpack is to introduce a Vanilla+ experience directed towards Medieval RP with a 'pinch of Fantasy' to introduce QOL but still immersive Waystones. I call it, _Simply Medieval_. 

When looking for a Medieval Modpack on Modrinth I am faced with either Modpacks that turn the game into a complete technical mess, or a complete Fantasy RPG simulator. I don't want either of those extremes. This modpack instead was focused around getting core medieval elements- such as  weapons and armor, into the game with as little added bloat as possible. In addition to adding an extra - but simple - layer of depth to the combat system. 

**Modpack Features**

Combat -

Adds simple features like putting swords/items on your back, Two-handed combat [which integrates with the vanilla slots] and new 3d armor sets. The new armor sets are sweet and discoverable in vanilla-generated loot chests. They are marginally better than Iron/Diamond. Which makes armor sets worth searching for but also not blatantly OP or neccessary to progress. However the 3d Models are SWEET seriously go check out that guys work. Also there are no added shields or enchantments. Additional mechanics found from the "MedievalWeapons" mod include Bleed and Stun Debuffs from specific weapons, and certain weapons providing better or shorter reaches. Two handed weapons adding block mechanics, and dual-wielding provides a cool look and a faster attack speed. 

Check out the Wiki for crafting and further information here: [https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/MedievalWeapons/](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/MedievalWeapons/)

Resources / Blocks - 

Dehyrdration Mod adds essentially a simple hydration system ontop of minecrafts food system. It's very easy to understand once you play with it, and it adds a bit of medieval flair. Block-wise it adds a Bamboo Pump, and Campfire Cauldron (Placed ontop of a Campfire Block) used to purify water. In addition some blocks are added through the Waystone Mod, which are primarily just the literal Waystones. 

Check out the Wiki for crafting and further information here: [https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/Dehydration/](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/Dehydration/)


Fantasy Elements - 

The only fantasy element included is the Waystones, which I always felt is a tasteful and useful system to help facilitate exploration and travel in the game. It's also the only included change to world generation (Villages) and additional craftable items (Besides weapons). Some of the neat features of this mod include EXP cost to waystones in survival, craftable teleport scrolls linked to waystones, and late game Warp-plates. 

Check out the Wiki for crafting and further information here: 
[https://mods.twelveiterations.com/minecraft-bedrock/waystones/warp-stone](https://mods.twelveiterations.com/minecraft-bedrock/waystones/warp-stone)

**Intention and Credit**

The intention of this modpack is to be used with my personal friends to create a neat server. Feel free to use the modpack as you see fit. I've checked all the mods included and they are all safe to use freely. All credit goes to the individual Mod creators please take the time to look and or support the Mod creators, I am simply a guy who threw them all together into a Modpack.
